title: HTUK Led Magnetic Dart Board Set, Safe Dart Game for Kids with 6 Darts, 41cm Diameter
features: SAFE DESIGN: Magnetic darts for child-friendly play without wall damage
TRADITIONAL LOOK: Features classic black, red, white, and green colors
COMPLETE SET: Includes 41cm diameter board and 6 magnetic darts
EASY SETUP: Pre-attached mount board for convenient hanging
AGE-APPROPRIATE: Suitable for children aged 6 and above
description: Product Description Magnetic Dart Board Set by HTUK A fantastic magnetic dartboard for children to improve their skills without leaving marks on the wallpaper! This magnetic dartboard is great to practise on with all your friends. This rigid board is 41cm diam and approx. 1.5cm thick. Complete with 6 magnetic darts. Traditional look darts game with 2 sets of magnetic darts. Play darts and practice your aim without the danger of putting holes in walls, or yourself! The flat magnet ends offer a safer alternative to the traditional dart tip. Board is finished with the traditional black, red, white and green of the classic dartboard Suitable for ages 6+ Pre-attached mount board for easy hanging, magnetic dart board, 6 magnetic darts Includes
